executives.name: Andre Liebenberg
executives.background: Andre has over 30 years of experience in the resources industry. He was previously at BHP where he held various senior roles including Acting President of Energy Coal and Head of Group Investor Relations. Prior to BHP, he was at UBS in London and Old Mutual in South Africa.

executives.name: Julian Ozanne
executives.background: Julian has over 25 years of experience in the resources and finance sectors. He was previously a partner at New World Capital and has held senior roles at various investment firms. He also served as a foreign correspondent for the Financial Times.

board_of_directors.name: The Lord (Anthony) St John of Bletso
board_of_directors.background: Lord St John has over 30 years of experience in the financial services and technology sectors. He is a crossbench member of the House of Lords and serves on the boards of several public and private companies.

board_of_directors.name: Sofia Bianchi
board_of_directors.background: Sofia has over 30 years of experience in finance and investment. She was previously Head of Special Situations at BlueCrest Capital Management and has held senior roles at the EBRD and Emerging Markets Partnership.

board_of_directors.name: The Hon. Alexander Downer
board_of_directors.background: Alexander was Australia's longest-serving Minister for Foreign Affairs and later served as the Australian High Commissioner to the UK. He has extensive experience in international relations and global politics.

board_of_directors.name: Emily Mahoney
board_of_directors.background: Emily has over 20 years of experience in the mining and resources sector. She is currently the Chief Human Resources Officer at Endeavour Mining and has previously held senior HR roles at Rio Tinto.
